    • rxEscape
    • toConstStr
    • `=~`

Imports

base_errors, colorstring

Types

RxFlavor = enum
  rxfEmacs, rxfPerl, rxfDebug, rxfLisp, rxfPosix, rxfExtendedPosix
RxSpecialKind = enum
  rskLineStart, rskLineEnd, rskStringStart, rskStringEnd, rskStringBoundary,
  rskStringOrLineEnd, rskWord, rskNotWord, rskSpace, rskNotSpace, rskDigit,
  rskNotDigit, rskAny
RxKind = enum
  rxkText, rxkCharset, rxkSpecial, rxkOneOrMoreGreedy, rxkOneOrMoreLazy,
  rxkZeroOrMoreGreedy, rxkZeroOrMoreLazy, rxkOptional, rxkAlt, rxkConcat,
  rxkGroup, rxkNonCapturingGroup, rxkRepeatNTimes, rxkRepeatNtoMTimes
RxSetElemKind = enum
  rseItem, rseRange
RxSetElem = object
  case kind*: RxSetElemKind
  of rseItem:
      item: char

  of rseRange:
      start, finish: char

  
Rx = object
  case kind*: RxKind
  of rxkText:
      text*: string

  of rxkSpecial:
      special*: RxSpecialKind

  of rxkCharSet:
      charElems: seq[RxSetElem]

  of rxkSingleArgKinds, rxkRepeatedArgKinds:
      args: seq[Rx]
      repeatMin*, repeatMax*: int

Consts

rxkGroupKinds = {rxkGroup, rxkNonCapturingGroup}
rxkSingleArgKinds = {rxkOneOrMoreGreedy, rxkOneOrMoreLazy, rxkZeroOrMoreGreedy,
                     rxkZeroOrMoreLazy, rxkOptional, rxkRepeatNTimes,
                     rxkRepeatNtoMTimes}
rxkRepeatedArgKinds = {rxkAlt..rxkNonCapturingGroup}

Funcs

func initRx(kind: RxKind; args: varargs[Rx]): Rx {...}{.raises: [ArgumentError],
    tags: [].}
func rxEscape(str: string): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func toStr(elem: RxSetElem): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func treeRepr(rx: Rx; colored: bool = true; level: int = 0): string {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}

    raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
func `$`(rx: Rx): string {...}{.raises: [ValueError], tags: [].}
func toStr(special: RxSpecialKind; flavor: RxFlavor = rxfPerl): string {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func toStr(kind: RxKind): string {...}{.raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}
func toStr(rx: Rx; flavor: RxFlavor = rxfPerl): string {...}{.
    raises: [ValueError, ArgumentError], tags: [].}
func toRegex(rx: static[Rx]): Regex
func toRegex(rx: Rx): Regex {...}{.raises: [RegexError, ValueError, ArgumentError],
                              tags: [].}
func toRegex(regex: Regex): Regex {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
func nrx(text: string): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
func nrx(ch: char): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
func nrx(special: RxSpecialKind): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
func nrx(ch1, ch2: char): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}
func nrx(charset: set[char]): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [], tags: [].}

func `+?`(rx: Rx): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}

func `*?`(rx: Rx): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}

func `|`(rxItems: openArray[Rx]): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}

func `&`(rxItems: openArray[Rx]): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}

func fullLine(rx: Rx): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}
func capture(rxSeq: varargs[Rx]): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}
func repeat(rx: Rx; repeatMin: int): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [ArgumentError],
    tags: [].}
func repeat(rx: Rx; repeatMin, repeatMax: int): Rx {...}{.inline,
    raises: [ArgumentError], tags: [].}
func atLeast(rx: Rx; repeatMin: int): Rx {...}{.inline, raises: [ArgumentError],
    tags: [].}

Templates

template rxEscape(ch: char): string
